title: Form View
description: The form view feature provides a unified interface for filling one or more forms (form response groups), reviewing submitted form answers in the same format as filled, and previewing form/section/question definitions in the form editor. It supports sequential section navigation with completion summaries, immediate answer persistence, save-and-resume, role-based access (filling on behalf of patient, review by authorized HCPs, preview by admins), and a submission workflow with immutability enforcement. The feature spans all three user interfaces: patient (filling own forms), HCP (filling/reviewing on behalf), and admin (previewing form definitions).
